description: Renders a parametric 3D curve from component functions x(t), y(t), z(t) over a parameter range.
utility: Plot a parametric space curve x(t), y(t), z(t) in 3D

arguments.name: graph
arguments.description: The 3D graph container created with g3d()

arguments.name: x(t)
arguments.description: X component as a function of t, in quotes

arguments.name: y(t)
arguments.description: Y component as a function of t, in quotes

arguments.name: z(t)
arguments.description: Z component as a function of t, in quotes

arguments.name: tRange
arguments.description: Parameter domain for t. Default: 0 to 2π

alternates.description: Space curve with three component functions of t

examples.expression:
G = g3d(at(4,23), view(30, 30))
helix = curve3d(G, "cos(t)", "sin(t)", "0.3*t", range(0, 4*pi), c(teal))

G = g3d(at(4,4), view(16, 8))
knot = curve3d(G, "sin(t)+2*sin(2*t)", "cos(t)-2*cos(2*t)", "-sin(3*t)", range(0, 2*pi))

G = g3d(at(5,5), view(20, 20))
c1 = curve3d(G, "t", "0.5*t", "0", range(0, 4), c(green))

G = g3d(at(4,23), view(30, 30))
curve = curve3d(G, "cos(t)", "sin(t)", "t", range(0, 2*pi))
tangent = tangentvec(G, curve, 1)
